revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-400

A low current density arc lamp with carbon electrodes not containing any other material.


Note: In Germany, the term Kohlebogenlampe covers all arc lamps with carbon electrodes of any composition.

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
